item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 19 May 2026
item.description:
1. hotseat Squava (a tiny LablGtk2 demo)
  2. Request for comments: What to do with opam packages that have known security vulnerabilities
  3. odoc 3.2.1 release
  4. List your open OCaml positions on the OCaml.org job board
  5. Cammy Stories: a small OCaml webcomic experiment 🐫
  6. MlFront_ProgressZig - Zig-compatible progress trees
  7. loo - lua of ocaml
